examples: Once, more than fifty hundred pairs of bald eagles nested across the country, but by 1960 that number had fallen below four hundred.
One day, a bird came and nested in the tree.
Today's land tortoises constitute a single branch, deeply nested among branches consisting of aquatic turtles.
In-app navigation is generally achieved via a series of nested screen, back buttons and long-press menus.
Meru, its five inter-nested rectangular walls and moats represent chains of mountains and the cosmic ocean.
